posture: 68 roles · 27 strong-act · 5 interim/contract worth fast action — Thursday 14:00 afternoon refresh, SEARCH-ONLY fallback (no Chrome connected). All still-live morning items carried forward and re-confirmed via search; Robert Half's Sydney risk/compliance/finance desk and Brighte's Senior Compliance Manager remain live. No new browser-verified roles added since the morning run.
summary: Afternoon run (14:00 Australia/Sydney) — search-only fallback again, as no Chrome browser is connected (list_connected_browsers empty), so the JavaScript-rendered boards (Seek, LinkedIn, Indeed, I Work for NSW, the Applyflow recruiter boards) could not be browser-verified and the morning's items carry forward as still-live leads. Discovery searches across Robert Half, Seek, I Work for NSW, Board Direction and the NED services re-surfaced the same live recruiter desk (Robert Half's Sydney risk/compliance/finance roles all still appear with unchanged deep-links) and turned up a few generic leads without working deep-links (a TfNSW enterprise-compliance day-rate contract, renewable-energy and private-markets Head of Finance roles, and Sharp & Carter interim finance listings) that could not be source-verified with a working URL this run and were not added. The list still leads with INTEC Energy Solutions' AU/NZ CFO (renewable energy) and Steadfast Group's Head of Finance & Business Partnering (insurance), with Brighte's Senior Compliance Manager the freshest source-verified add. A manual look at Seek, LinkedIn, I Work for NSW and AICD Directorship Opportunities remains worthwhile; only Robert Half (server-rendered) and the Brighte careers page were source-verified this run — everything else is a carried-forward lead. Reminder for the interim market: stay CV-current and registered with the risk/finance contract specialists (Bluefin, Kaizen, JS Careers, KPP, Robert Half, Sharp & Carter), where unadvertised day-rate work moves fastest.

items.so_what: Function (ministerial/parliamentary affairs) sits outside your risk/finance/governance core, so situational only — but a Robert Walters day-rate contract touching information-access (GIPA/FOI) governance and your local-government background; being CV-current with the §1a recruiters is where this interim work comes from.
